ContentMetadata.title: Content Metadata
ContentMetadata.description: Metadata for uploaded content on Shelby Stream

blob_id.description: Unique identifier for the blob on Shelby Fiber Network

creator_wallet_address.description: Wallet address of the content creator

content_type.description: MIME type of the content (e.g., video/mp4)

created_at.description: Timestamp when the content was uploaded
